hibernate-mapping.sql-query: IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[ROI_Conversion_RequestorLetter]') AND type in (N'P', N'PC')) DROP PROCEDURE [dbo].[ROI_Conversion_RequestorLetter]

SELECT t1.ROI_RequestorLetter_Seq FROM ROI_RequestorLetter t1 JOIN ROI_ConversionStatus_RequestorLetter t2 on t1.ROI_RequestorLetter_Seq = t2.ROI_RequestorLetter_Seq and (t2.Status = 'Completed') where t2.ROI_RequestorLetter_Seq IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(t1.ROI_RequestorLetter_Seq) FROM ROI_RequestorLetter t1 LEFT JOIN ROI_ConversionStatus_RequestorLetter t2 on t1.ROI_RequestorLetter_Seq = t2.ROI_RequestorLetter_Seq and (t2.Status = 'Completed') where t2.ROI_RequestorLetter_Seq IS NULL
